source.title: Structural Damage - Crane Other Lifting - Electrical Fire in Drilling Switchboard Room

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Keathley Canyon Block 875

event.top_event: Electrical fire in drilling switchboard room
actions_taken: General alarm activated requiring personnel to muster stations
Chief Mate and Marine Section Leader mobilized to switchboard room
Fire Team #1 confirmed no visible fire but noted equipment damage
ABB Field Service Engineer mobilized on 30 May 2019 for failure analysis
BSEE inspectors conducted investigation on 18 June 2019
Failed ADWB equipment shipped to ABB for analysis
event.summary: On 28 May 2019 at 21:00 hours, smoke detectors activated in the Starboard 690V Drilling Switchboard Room aboard the Diamond Offshore Ocean Blackhornet drillship. An electrical fire occurred in the Aux Drawworks B (ADWB) motor drive cabinet, causing severe damage to two Inverter Modules and two Variable Frequency Drives. The general alarm was activated and all personnel reported to muster stations. No injuries were reported. The assessed damage was approximately $180,000. The root cause could not be definitively determined, but possible causes included a faulty Inverter Module, cooling water leakage, or improperly torqued DC fuses.
recommendations: Further failure analysis testing of ADWB equipment required to identify exact fault origin
Two Inverter Modules should be sent for thorough failure analysis

hazards.name: Flammable materials in electrical equipment enclosure

threats.name: Electrical arc discharge in ADWB cabinet
Circuit breaker overload on DC bus
Cooling water leakage into electrical enclosure

consequences.name: Equipment damage and loss of drilling capability

controls.name: Smoke detection system in switchboard room
controls.lod_basis: Detection system activated before visible fire

supporting_text: At approximately 21:00 hours on 28 May 2019, two smoke detectors sounded off when smoke was detected in the DO Ocean Blackhornet's Starboard 690V Drilling Switchboard Room

controls.name: General alarm system and muster procedures
controls.lod_basis: Alarm activated and personnel responded to muster stations

supporting_text: Immediately, the general alarm was given that required all response personnel to report to their assigned duty stations and all non-essential personnel to report to their designated lifeboat muster stations
At 21:18 hours, the all clear was given and all personnel were then dismissed from their muster stations

controls.name: Fire Team response and room ventilation
controls.lod_basis: Fire Team confirmed no visible fire and room was secured and ventilated

supporting_text: At 21:11 hours, Fire Team #1 confirmed that there was no fire in the room
The Starboard 690V Drilling Switchboard Room was secured and ventilated

controls.name: Circuit breaker protection on DC bus
controls.barrier_role: Prevent electrical overload and arc discharge
controls.lod_basis: Circuit breakers designed to trip on overload

supporting_text: DO suspected that a circuit breaker had overloaded on the direct current bus side that caused the circuit breakers feeding the 690V Drilling Drive to trip

controls.name: DC fuse installation and torque specifications
controls.barrier_role: Prevent electrical faults from improper installation
controls.lod_basis: Ceramic fuses require specific torque to prevent hairline cracks

supporting_text: the DC fuses may not have been properly torqued when installed given that ceramic fuses have a specific torque spec that when not followed, can develop hairline cracks and a break down in the insulation making the fuses susceptible to shorting

controls.name: Cooling water system maintenance and monitoring
controls.barrier_role: Prevent water leakage into electrical enclosure
controls.lod_basis: Cooling system designed to prevent leakage into ADWB cabinet

supporting_text: the ADWB cabinet cooling water system may have developed a leak inside the enclosure due to a mixtures of metal content, total bacteria, and pH level and the leak may have caused a short circuit and subsequent flash from an Inverter Module
liquid spray marks were observed inside the ADWB cabinet

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
